sanskrit: रुद्रादित्या वसवो ये च साध्या विश्वेऽश्विनौ मरुतश्चोष्मपाश्च। गन्धर्वयक्षासुरसिद्धसङ्घा वीक्षन्ते त्वां विस्मिताश्चैव सर्वे॥
transliteration: rudrādityā vasavo ye ca sādhyā viśve’śvinau marutaś coṣmapāś ca | gandharva-yakṣāsura-siddha-saṅghā vīkṣante tvāṃ vismitāś caiva sarve ||
literal_meaning: Rudras, Ādityas, Vasus, Sādhyas, Viśvadevas, Aśvins, Maruts, ancestors, Gandharvas, Yakṣas, Asuras, Siddhas—all assemblies gaze at You in amazement.
contextual_meaning: Every inner archetype—protective, sensual, aggressive, wise—simultaneously stops and stares when the full splendor of the Self is unveiled.
psychological_state: Total archetypal recognition: every sub-personality falls silent, confronted with the wholeness it has never seen united before.
trigger_scenario: In therapy, the moment every inner voice—from critic to caretaker to rebel—simultaneously realizes they are facets of one psyche and falls speechless.
anchor_text: When your true Self shines, every inner voice falls silent in awe.
